items.title: Marqeta (MQ) Supports Klarna Card Expansion in Europe
items.description: Marqeta, Inc. (NASDAQ:MQ) is one of the 12 Best American Penny Stocks to Buy Right Now. On November 3, Marqeta, Inc. (NASDAQ: MQ) shared that it is working with Klarna to expand Klarna Card into 15 new European markets. Klarna is a global digital bank and flexible payments provider. This new expansion builds upon Marqeta, […]
